docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE - NOT STATED SERVED MAR-31-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLEGG, KIMBERLY
